PostToolUse.description: No-codegen reminders: ARB changes need flutter gen-l10n; pubspec changes need flutter pub get (project does not use build_runner)

hooks.command: bash -c 'f="${CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS:-}"; for file in $f; do case "$file" in *.arb) echo "⚠️  ARB changed → run: flutter gen-l10n";; *pubspec.yaml) echo "⚠️  pubspec.yaml changed → run: flutter pub get";; esac; done; exit 0'
